attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EL.OBJECT_ID,
EL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID, 
-8888 as LINE_NUMBER, 
EL.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL AS LINE_TYPE_NAME, 
EL.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL,
EL.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
EL.QUANTITY,
EL.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
EL.PART_NUMBER,
'UNKNOWN' AS DESCRIPTION, 
NULL AS FULFILLMENT_TYPE, 
EL.DURATION,
EL.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
NULL AS MLB_INDICATOR,
EL.PROMO_DISC,
EL.NONSTANDARD_DISC,
EL.TRADE_IN_DISC, 
EL.MULTI_YEAR_DISC, 
NULL AS ACTIVE, 
COALESCE(EL.CREATED_DATE, CURRENT_DATE) as CREATED_DATE,
COALESCE(EL.CREATED_BY,'CCWR') as  CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(EL.UPDATED_DATE, CURRENT_DATE) as UPDATED_DATE,
COALESCE(EL.UPDATED_BY,'CCWR') as  UPDATED_BY,
EL.WEB_ORDER_ID, 
NULL AS ORDER_STATUS,
NULL AS WF_PRICED, 
NULL AS SMT_LINE_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN' AS SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
EL.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,
NULL AS NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,
NULL AS ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
NULL AS TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
'=' AS OEM_REB_FLAG,
NULL AS PROGRAM_ID,
NULL AS AS_PROJECT_NUMBER, 
EL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
NULL AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN' AS ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
-999.000000 AS GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
-999.000000 AS TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
'N' AS UI_HIDE_FLG,
EL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
EL.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
EL.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
-999 AS REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
'UNKNOWN' AS ACTION_TAG_NM,
EL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.BILLING_MODEL_NM,
EL.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RATE_TABLE_NM,
'UNKNOWN' AS RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
EL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
EL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
EL.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
EL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
-999 AS USAGE_QTY,
-999.0000000 AS SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
EL.REQUESTED_START_DATE,
EL.REQUESTED_END_DATE,
'UNKNOWN' AS MAGIC_KEY,
-999.000000 AS MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,
INSTANCE_ID AS INSTANCE_ID,
'N' AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
-999 AS AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
'UNKNOWN' AS AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
QUOTE_STATUS,
PRICE_LIST_ID,
EL.SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_RNWL_KFKA EL
/* Commenting as part of CCWR
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EL.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,EL.OBJECT_ID  ORDER BY EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1*/
Where EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW_RNWL_KAFKA')
